titleStmt.title: SII 38.235: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 235. (A.R. No. 235 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On a second pillar in the kitchen of the same temple.

p.hi: King: Rājakēsarivarmaṉ alias Mummuḍichōḻa (Rājarāja I) Year 3: 988 A.D.

summary.p: Records a gift of garland (paḷḷitoṅkal) called Rājarājaṉ, a shell like cup of gold (oṭṭuvaṭṭil) called Mummuḍichōḻaṉ and also a gold door for the mēvāśi called Rājarājaṉ, obviously to the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr by the temple official (śrīkāriyam) Vaḻakkēi tuṇai Guṇaśīlaṉ of Muḷḷikuṟumbil in Uṟaiyūr-kūṟṟam in Śōṇāḍu for the merit of Aḍigal Nīrāḍi, of Ūṟṟukkāḍu, in Āvūr-kūṟṟam in Śōṇāḍu, who was also an official (śrī-kāriyam) of the temple at Tiruvoṟṟiyūr.

It is also stated that these ornaments were made out of the fines amounting to 811 kaḻañju of gold collected from the temples and villages. The inscription also gives the break-up of the gold, used for making different ornaments.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kovirājakesariparmarākiya śrīmummuṭi
coḻatevarkki yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu tiruvoṟṟiyūrāḷvār
śrīkāryyamarāykiṉṟa coṇāṭṭu Āvūrkūṟṟattu Ūṟṟukkā
ṭṭu Ūṟṟukkāṭuṭaiyāṉaṭikaḷ nirāṭikkāka Ittevar
śrīkāryyamarāykiṉṟa coṇāṭṭu Uṟaiyūr kuṟṟattuRead uṟaiyūr kūṟṟattumu
ḷḷi kuṟumpil muḷḷikuṟumpiluṭaiyāṉ
vaḻakkeytuṇaikuṇacilaṉ Ittevarāya
meykūṭṭi mutalākkiṉa poṉ Aṟunūṟṟe muppattai
ñ kaḻañcu Ivaṉey yivvūrilun tevataāṉaṅkaḷilu
ntaṇṭaṅ koṇṭu mutalākkiṉa poṉ nūṟṟumuppaIt is likely the engraver committed a mistake here instead of writing nūṟṟu eḻupattaiṅ kaḻañcu he wrongly engraved. nūṟṟu muppattaiñ kaḻañcu. The total amount eṇṇūṟṟorupatiṉ kaḻañcu will be realised only when the amount collected by way of fines could be the former amount.
ttaiñ kaḻañcumaāka mutalākkiṉa poṉ Eṇṇū
ṟṟorupatiṉ kaḻañcu Itaṉuḷ rājarājaneṉṟu
cevittup paḷḷittoṅkali mukiṉRead muttiṉ ḷuri
ḷil poṉ muppatiṉ kaḻañcāka mukiṉRead muttiṉpaṉṉira
ṇṭiraip poṉtuḷai muṉṉūṟṟaṟupatiṉ
kaḻañcum mummaṭicoḻaṉeṉṟu cevitta Oṭṭu
vaṭṭil Oṉṟiṉāl poṉtuḷai muṉṉūṟṟai
mpatiṉ kaḻañcum rājarājaneṉṟu mevāsikku
ceyvitta tirukkatavukku Iṭṭa poṉ tuḷai ṉūṟṟu
kaḻañcu Āka poṉ ṟorupatiṉ kaḻa
ñcu Itu Damaged.
Digital edition of SII 38.235 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
